event_info: good start from Cummins. Yorker on middle. Jacks jams it out to backward point. The fielder dives to his left and keeps it down to a single
good length delivery on middle. Not much swing on offer. Rickelton gets behind the line and defends it to mid-off
pitches on middle and leg; Rickelton is right behind the line in defence
beaten! Wasn't far away from the off-stump. Was angled across the left-hander; Rickelton looks to slog it across the line and misses
Rickelton tries to force it to the off-side. Gets a thick inside edge an the ball runs down to deep backward square leg. This was angled across the left-hander

length delivery on off. Jacks goes through with the shot. Doesn't get it off the meat; but has enough bat to clear the in-field. The outfield is quick and the ball races away for Mumbai Indian's first boundary
Shot! Praful Hinge has been greeted with a massive six. Length delivery on off; Rickelton picks it up early and heaves it over deep mid-wicket. The new ball flies into the stands
back of a length delivery on off; Rickelton pushes it wide of mid-on for a quick single
phew! This was hit with some power. There was a fielder in the deep. He hardly had 10 yards to move; but the ball beats him for four. Was short and wide outside off; Jacks slaps it wide of deep point
more runs. Hinge sees Jacks advance down the track and bowls it short outside off. Jacks reaches out for the ball and looks to pull. Takes the top edge and flies over slip cordon
good stop. Travis Head saves a boundary at short third man. Another short delivery outside off; Jacks gets a thick outside edge as he cuts. The ball falls just short of diving fielder
back of a length delivery on middle. Jacks comes down the wicket and gets beaten on the slog. The ball sails over the middle stump
back of a length delivery angling across; Rickelton muscles it away over the in-field. Clears mid-wicket and the ball raced away

this is the shot of the day so far. Bowled at 142.6ks on middle. Ryan Rickelton leans onto the front foot and drills it straight back down the pitch. Cummins couldn't do much as it was coming at pace in his followthrough
yorker down the leg-stump. Wided
fullish in length on middle; Rickelton mistimes the push wide of long-on. Good running from the duo as they pushed the first run hard and got the second easily
full toss on the pads; tucked to the on-side for a run
half-volley outside off; Jacks chips it over the in-field. Goes through with the shot and pumps it to sweeper cover fence
Cummins gets away with it. He bowls another full delivery outside off; Jacks squeezes it out straight to the man at backward point. An inch either side would have fetched him runs
Malinga starts with the off-cutter on leg-stump. Pushed back to the bowler
slower delivery outside leg-stump. Malinga sees Rickelton move away. He plays early and is beaten on the inside edge. The ball rolls to the off-side of the thigh pad
slower short delivery outside off; Jacks drags it to deep square leg off the toe end
drops just short of the man at short fine leg. Banged in short on off; Rickelton pulls off the top-edge. Praful probably didn't pick it up. He stays back and the ball drops in front of him
another chance this time. Was not easy for sure. This was flicked off the pads and the ball flies to short fine leg. The ball drops in front of the fielder and ricochets off his hand to the on-side
back of a length delivery well outside the tramline. Wide called
slower short delivery outside off; Jacks drags it to the on-side
50-run opening stand comes up with a six. Harsh Dubey starts with a slot delivery on middle; Jacks smokes it straight back over the bowlers head. The ball smashes into the sightscreen
flatter on middle; tucked to the on-side
quicker delivery on middle; Jacks makes room and cuts it to cover-point
another flatter delivery aimed at the stumps. Jacks walks across and sweeps it behind square. Doesn't bother to keep it down; gets it off the meat and sails deep into the stands
touch shortish on middle; Jacks cuts it to cover-point
hint of width on offer; Will Jacks is quick to bounce on it. Cuts it hard and past backward point. No chance for the fielders to stop that once it beats the in-field
both the openers have ensured they greet every bowler with a boundary so far. This was short and asking to be hit. Rickelton shuffles across and pulls it high and handsome over deep square leg
back of a length delivery angling across the left-hander. Infact was a cutter. Rickelton mistimes it to mid-off
another short delivery and Rickelton had deposited it deep into cow corner fence. Was a slower short delivery; Rickelton spots it early and is a great position to power it for six
more runs. Sakib Hussain tries to go fuller; but gives Rickelton the width he needs. Rickelton throws the bat at it and gets the ball through cover-point region
off-cutter on leg-stump. Turned to the on-side
back of a length delivery angling in; Jacks dabs it down to short third man
darted into the right-hander; Jacks pushes it down to long-on
flatter on middle; Rickelton whips it to the on-side and gets back for a brace
slightly slower through the air. Rickelton reaches out for the ball and sweeps it to deep square leg
tossed up outside off; Jacks reaches out for the ball and slog sweeps it straighter. Clears long-on with ease for another maximum
shortish on middle. Doesn't bounce as much; Jacks stays low and pulls it to deep square leg
poor delivery and Harsh Dubey pays the price. Low full toss down leg; Rickelton gets across and helps it down to fine leg. Places it wide of the fielder at short fine

ball_event: out Caught by Ishan Kishan!! Nitish Reddy gets the breakthrough. A desperate one for SRH. Nitish gets the ball to shape away a touch
event_info: Jacks goes for the drive away from his body. The length wasn't there for the shot and the swing takes the outside edge. Flies to Ishan Kishan; who takes a regulation catch. Will Jacks walks off to an applause. Will Jacks c Ishan Kishan b Nitish Reddy 46(22) [4s-5 6s-3]

Suryakumar Yadav gets off the mark with a boundary. A poor delivery from Nitish. Bowls a short delivery well outside off; SKY steers it behind square on the off-side. No chance for the fielder in the deep
good length delivery on off; Suryakumar pushes it wide of cover-point
what a shot that is. Half-volley outside off; Rickelton drills the cover drive past sweeper cover. That sounded crisp as it left the bat. The fielder in the deep had no chance to cut that

Rickelton gets to his fifty with a trademark shot. Was on the pads; Rickelton flicks it behind square on the on-side. His bat turns as he makes contact; yet manages to clear the fence with ease. Wankhede crowd erupt as Rickelton raises his bat and soaks in the applause
very full outside off; Rickelton digs it out wide of sweeper cover. Duo get back for a brace. 17-runs and a wicket off Nitish Reddy's first over
back of a length delivery on leg-stump; Suryakumar misses the pull and is hit on the back thigh pad
short delivery well outside off; Suryakumar drags it off toe end to mid-on

ball_event: out Caught by Abhishek Sharma!! Suryakumar Yadav's poor run of form continues. This was a short delivery at the batter's badge. SKY goes for the pull
event_info: he was in two minds as he does so. Gets it high on the bat and sails to fine leg. Abhishek Sharma; runs to his left and takes a comfortable catch just inside the boundary ropes. Suryakumar stands there in disbelief and is not ready to walk back. Suryakumar Yadav c Abhishek Sharma b Eshan Malinga 5(5) [4s-1]

Naman dabs it to backward point and sets off for a quick single. Rickelton sends him back in time. The fielder has a shy at the striker's end and misses. There is no one backing up and Naman gets off the mark with a run
Rickelton shuffes across and pulls it to short fine. Scampers for a quick single and makes his ground
good length delivery outside off; Naman gets it off the bottom edge down to short third man
good length delivery outside off; punched to cover
little inside edge onto the pads as Pat Cummins gets one to nip in off the surface. Naman gets to the other end as the ball rolls in front of point
short delivery on middle; pulled to deep square leg
143ks half-volley outside off; Naman Dhir presents the full face of the bat and drills the cover drive. Didn't look to overhit; he times it so well and gets it past mid-off for four
Naman gets inside the line of the ball and tucks it to the on-side
slower short delivery outside off. Ryan Rickelton flat bats it through covers. Ends the over with a boundary
back of a length and well wide of off; cut square on the off-side for a single
the bouncer from Sakib; but it sails high over Ryan Rickelton's head; called as a wide
fuller length delivery at the stumps; whipped down to long-on for a single
fraction short and at the stumps - Dhir swivels across and then pulls it backward of square on the on-side for a run
nicely played; slower short ball from Hussain; but the length is a tad too short; lets Rickelton swivel across on the pull and places it behind square on the on-side for a boundary
full on the pad; Rickelton whips it to deep square leg. The fielder in the deep; runs to his left and keeps it down to a single
nicely played; short and at stumps; was another slower ball and it's pulled behind square on the on-side for a boundary
thumped; flighted delivery outside off and Rickelton doesn't miss out - it's right in the slot and it's hoisted high over wide long-on for a maximum
back-to-back sixes fopr Rickelton - flighted delivery and drifting across the left-hander; but it's right in the slot once again and it's hoicked back over the bowler's head for another maximum
full-toss outside off and it's drilled down towards long-off - the fielder slides across and prevents the boundary
very full and just outside off; driven down to long-off for a single
Dubey tosses one on the leg-stump line - Dhir backs away and picks out cover with the drive
hammered; tossed up on off; Dhir gets forward and absolutely smashes it back over the bowler's head; one bounce and over the ropes. 19 off the over
short and at the left-hander - Rickelton is early into the pull and miscues it wide of mid-wicket
on a good length and angling into the right-hander; driven down to long-on for a single
short and just outside off - pulled through mid-wicket for a single
fuller length delivery on off; punched down to long-off for a single
fuller length delivery on the pads; flicked behind square on the on-side for a single
the slower ball; but Malinga has bowled it miles outside the tramline; landed just inside the pitch and is called as a wide
fuller length delivery at the stumps; punched down to long-off for a single
the slower short ball outside off - swatted away through mid-wicket for a single
yorker length delivery outside off; squeezed down to long-off for a single
banged in short and into the pitch; angles across the right-hander and beats him on the pull

ball_event: out Caught by Harsh Dubey!! A skier
event_info: went a mile into the air and when it dropped down; Harsh Dubey is under it at deep mid-wicket - was the slower ball on the pads and Dhir was early into the flick; the bat-face turned on impact; the ball caught the leading edge and lobbed high towards deep mid-wicket. Naman Dhir c Harsh Dubey b Praful Hinge 22(17) [4s-3]
on a good length and at the pads; clipped wide of mid-wicket for a single
fuller length delivery at the stumps; drilled down to long-on for a single
short and wide of off; Rickelton reaches out and toe-ends it to cover's right - Cummins dives and keeps them down to a single
short of a good length and just outside off - too close to the body as Pandya mistimes the chop to the off-side
full-toss on the pads; whipped down to long leg; the fielder is in the ring and has no chance
clubbed; he's onto 99* now - back of a length and angling into the left-hander; Rickelton swivels across; picks the length and pulls it over bacxkward square leg for a maximum
back of a length and just outside off - Rickelton rides the bounce and dabs it to backward point
has Rickelton been strangled down leg? A big shout for caught behind; but it's called as a wide instead - the slower bouncer down leg; Rickelton was swivelling across on the pull and missed

a hundred for Rickelton; he leaps in the air and punches in delight - emotion coming out for Ryan Rickelton - his maiden IPL hundred. Fastest by a MI batter; the previous was from Sanath Jayasuriya who took 45 balls. Was a slower short ball and he muscled the pull past square leg
a top-edge and the ball bounces away to the long leg boundary - slower bouncer from Hinge and Rickelton wasn't in control over the pull; gets enough to clear the man in the ring
yorker length delivery on off; squeezed square on the off-side for a single
top-edge and four; banged in short and pushed across the right-hander; Hardik swipes across the line; gets a fat top-edge and the ball bounces away to the ropes
clubbed; on a good length and angling across the right-hander - Hardik stays deep in the crease; brings the bottom-hand into play and then shovels it wide of long-on for a maximum
MI are on a roll now; they've brought up their 200; full-toss from Hinge and it's heaved over mid-wicket for a boundary
much better from Hinge; yorker length delivery on middle and it's jammed out to the on-side; comes back for the second run; 21 off the over
slower short ball outside off - chopped in front of square on the off-side for a single
yorker length delivery at the stumps; punched down to long-on for a single
slower short ball outside off - pulled in front of square on the on-side for a single
yorker length delivery at the stumps; squeezed down to long-on for a single
fuller length delivery outside off - driven square on the off-side for a single
on a good length and just outside off - nudged in front of point for a single
crunched; Malinga misses the yorker by an inch and he's made to pay - Hardik gets under it and then clubs it high over long-on for a maximum
yorker length delivery at the stumps; driven back past the non-striker - the ball finds some saw-dust as it rolled down to long-on and they're back for the second
the slower short ball outside off; pushed wide of off and it's called as a wide
to deep mid-wicket

the slower short ball outside off; loops past Ryan Rickelton's pull and is called as a wide. But SRH have reviewed - did look high to the naked eye. It's definitely going above his head. Onto the numbers now - head high is 1.84m; ball has gone at 2.1m; so it'll be a wide. He then checks with the UltraEdge and there's a flat line
full-toss and Rickelton went hard on the slog; mistimes it to long-on for a single
yorker length delivery outside off; Hardik looks to squeeze it out and misses
short of a good length and just outside off - a miscued pull to long-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! That's a simple catch to long-off - was full and wide of off
event_info: right in the slot and Hardik was shaping for the lofted drive. He arched back and threw everything on the lofted drive; but as he did so; he lost his poise and ended up holing out to long-off. Hardik Pandya c Heinrich Klaasen b Sakib Hussain 31(15) [4s-2 6s-2]
hammered; no sighters for Tilak - length ball at the stumps and the left-hander drives it through the line; a clean swing and the ball sails into the crowd at long-on
banged in short and at the stumps - Tilak shuffled across on the pull and missed
slower ball at the stumps; muscled away past mid-wicket for a single
back of a length and angling across the left-hander; swiped away through mid-wicket for a single
slower ball outside off; banged into the pitch and pushed across the left-hander - Tilak swipes across the line and is undone by the lack of pace
full and at the pads; whipped to long-on's left and Rickelton is back for the second
low full-toss outside off - Rickelton went hard on the drive and mistimed it to long-off

ball_event: out Caught by Heinrich Klaasen!! Another catch in the deep and SRH continue to fightback. This was full and just outside off - Tilak cleard his front-leg and couldn't get under the ball
event_info: hit it flat and hard; no elevation behind the shot and it's a straightforward catch to Klaasen at long-off. Tilak Varma c Heinrich Klaasen b Praful Hinge 7(5) [6s-1]

a low full-toss outside off - Minz went hard on the drive and squeezed an inside edhe onto the pad; they were always going for the single and Hinge did get ahead of Ryan Rickelton. But he fails to ccollect the ball cleanly and lets Ryan Rickelton escape
thumped; a juicy full-toss and Rickelton has put it away; backs away; sets a stable base for himself and smashes it onto the sightscreen
top-edge and four; a slower bouncer from Hinge and Rickelton was early into the pull; the ball caught the glove and lobbed over the keeper's head for a boundary
Boult gets the ball to swing across the left-hander on fullish length delivery outside off. Abhishek jams it out to the off-side
another outswinger outside off; but was on a length. Abhishek lunges forward and pumps it over cover. Sails way into the stands for the first maximum
pitched up and well outside off; wide called
angled into the left-hander; Abhishek Sharma misses the flick. Another wide from Trent Boult
punched off the back foot. Abhishek stands tall and times the punch to deep point
swinging away outside off; Travis Head opens the bat face and dabs it down to short third man

just past the diving short third man. That would have been a stunner had Will Jacks held onto it. Was flying low to his left; Jacks dives full length with his left arm stretched out. The ball beats him and runs down to third man. Head got a thick outside edge on the cut
back of a length delivery outside off; Abhishek cuts it to deep point
back of a length delivery angling across Abhishek; steered to deep point
Travis Head misses out on a full toss. Hits it straight to point. Probably tried to hit it too hard instead of placing it
angling across the left-hander; Head cuts it to deep point for a run
sprayed well outside the tramline. Wided
short delivery well down leg. Another wide called
Abhishek Sharma has tonked one over long-on. Picks the slower delivery from Bumrah and deposits it deep into the stands. Nice flow off the bat
FOUR; poor from Bumrah. Sprayed down the leg; Abhishek Sharma misses the tuck. The ball runs down to fine leg fence off the thigh pad
banged in short at the batter; Abhishek Sharma goes for the pull and misses. The ball sails over the attempted shot

dropped! Whats worse? The ball bursts through Naman Dhir's hand and goes over the ropes. Short delivery outside off; Travis Head cuts uppishly to deep point. Naman Dhir ran to his left and jumps across to try and get both hands for the catch. The ball burst through his hands and goes for a six
length delivery outside off; Travis Head gets beaten
in the channel outside off; Travis Head defends it to the left of Boult
width on offer; Travis Head throws the kitchen sink at it. Moves away from the line and slashes hard. The ball flies over sweeper cover fence
another six off the over. A pick shot from Head. He walks inside the line of the ball and flicks it high and handsome over backward square leg fence
good comeback from Boult; but the damage was already done. Back of the length delivery outside off; Travis Head tries to cut and misses. Gets beaten on the outside edge
catch it was the shout; but that trickled over the ropes. Was flighted on leg-stump with mid-on it. Abhishek Sharma makes room and chips it off the inside half of the blade for four
slower and drifting across the left-hander; left alone
50-run stand comes up in just 21 balls. Flatter on middle; Abhishek Sharma thumps it straight back over the bowler's head. The ball hits flat on the sightscreen
driven wide of long-off for a run
another loopy delivery and asking for trouble. Travis Head clears his front foot and smokes it down the ground. Clears the fielder with ease for another maximum
flatter on the pads; Travis Head whips it wide of long-on. The fielder in the deep had no chance
flatter on middle; Abhishek knocks it down to long-off
back of a length delivery outside off; Travis Head looks to hoick it on the on-side and misses

dropped again by Naman Dhir! This was there to be taken. The ball got big on Travis Head as he looked to cut. Still goes through with the shot and goes just over Naman Dhir's leap. The ball brushes his fingers and runs away for four
flatter delivery on middle; Travis Head heaves it to the on-side. The fielder in the deep runs across and tries to stop; but the outfield makes it hard
driven down to long-on
flatter down the leg; Abhishek Sharma tickles it down to fine leg. No chance of stopping that. Raced away for four
smashed; even Bumrah isnh't been spared - was the attempted slower ball; but it's right in the slot and Head smashes it back over the bowler's heasd; sails over the ropes for a maximum. A 99m hit
nicely played; slower ball on off; Head backs away; opens the face of the bat and then slices the drive behind point; runs away to the ropes
short and at the stumps; Head is early into the pull and missed - off the shoulder and rolled to the off-side
full-toss outside off - driven straight to the fielder at cover-point
clattered; back of a length and well wide of off; Abhishek runs down the pitch; makes room and then slaps it over backward point for a maximum
fuller length delivery on the stumps; driven down to long-on for a single. 18 off Bumrah's over - 92 off the batting PP and they've taken the strategic break
banged in short and just outside off; tad too high though and it's called as a wide
the boundaries keep flowing; fuller length delivery and well wide of off - Abhishek leans across into the drive and carves it over cover; one bounce and over the ropes
low full-toss on middle; pushed down to long-on for a single

another half-chance; but Naman Dhir has done well to prevent a six here? Or has he? No; it's given as a six. Was full and wide of off - Head leant across and then carved the drive over point; high and towards Dhir was who was a yard inside the ropes. He leapt; might've taken the catch and then realised that the momentum was probably taking him onto the ropes. He tried to fling it back into play as he went down; but couldn't do so in time. Also raises a 20-ball fifty for Head
short; wide and six; width on offer; Head makes more room and cuts it high over backward point; sails over the ropes for a maximum
creamed; too full and too wide of off; Head is on his knee as he creams the drive through extra-cover; races away to the ropes
fuller length delivery at the stumps and it's chipped down to long-on - 23 off the over
fuller length delivery at the stumps; squeezed to the on-side for a single
a low full-toss on the pads; clipped through mid-wicket for a single
short and into the pitch; pulled behind square on the on-side for a single
yorker length delivery at the stumps; squeezed down to mid-on for a single
whipped; Head is on a roll tonight at the Wankhede - fuller length delivery on the pads and he brings his wrists into play; a nonchalant on-drive and he sends it into the crowd at long-on
full-toss from Hardik; driven down to wide mid-wicket for a single
fraction short and just outside off - cut away square on the off-side for a single
very full from Ghazanfar; Abhishek toe-ends the drive back at the bowler

a miscue and Abhishek gets away; they've had luck today - tossed up just outside off and Abhishek went hard on the drive; sliced it off the outside edge; over cover and drops wide of the fielder in the deep

ball_event: out Caught by Trent Boult!! He's gone now and MI can heave a sigh of relief. Was tossed up invitingly outside off and Abhishek couldn't hold himself back. Was shaping to slog it onto the on-side
event_info: lost his shape and the leading edge popped up to the off-side - Boult moves to his left and completes a simple catch. Abhishek Sharma c Trent Boult b AM Ghazanfar 45(24) [4s-4 6s-3]

ball_event: out Bowled!! Two-in-two for Ghazanfar and the Wankhede roars. Looked like the slider
event_info: kept coming back to the left-hander and cramped Kishan for room on the cut - he went through with the shot; gets an under-edge and the ball bounces back onto the stumps. Ishan Kishan b AM Ghazanfar 0(1)
tossed up and drifting onto the pads; tucked behind square on the on-side for a single
short and at the stumps; pulled through mid-wicket for a single
a wide full-toss and Head squeezes it out past point
fuller length delivery outside off - Klaasen went hard on the drive and slices a thick outside edge over point; the ball falls short of the man in the deep

ball_event: out Caught by Will Jacks!! Three in quick succession and MI are back in this - Hardik went full and wide of off
event_info: made Head reach out on the drive; it's a low full-toss alright; but the left-hander doesn't get the necessary elevation on the drive. Scoops it in the air and to the left of extra-cover - Wil Jacks with a safe caatch. Travis Head c Will Jacks b Hardik Pandya 76(30) [4s-4 6s-8]
on a good length and just outside off; Nitish plays with soft hands and defends it to the off-side
fuller length delivery outside off - driven straight to the fielder at mid-off. A direct hit might've had Nitish short; but he scrambles home with the dive
poor delivery down the leg; Nitish Kumar hits it on it's head and helps it down to fine leg
flighted delivery outside off; mistimed it down to long-off
flatter on middle; Heinrich Klaasen taps it back to Ghazanfar
short delivery on the stumps; Heinrich Klaasen is quick on his back foot and pulls it to mid-wicket. Got in a great position as he powers it for four
phew! This is even better. Klaasen sits on the back foot and pulls it flat. Not much elevation on the ball; went low and over the ropes
full and well outside off;; Heinrich Klaasen square drives it to deep point
short delivery outside off; Heinrich Klaasen hops across and flat bats it in front of square on the off-side. Gets it over the fielder at covers
another short delivery; this time at the body. Klaasen pulls it to deep square leg
full toss outside off; driven down to long-off
wow! This is vintage Klaasen. Short delivery outside off; Heinrich Klaasen rocks on the back foot and slaps it straight back over the bowler. Fielders in the deep were just spectators
this is asking for trouble. Full toss outside off; Heinrich Klaasen drives it past cover. Didn't try to hit it hard; just places it wide of the fielder and collects four more

Klaasen has picked the gap to perfection. At first it looked it he placed it for a brace. The timing was so good that long-on fielder couldn't get across to stop it. Was banged in short outside off; Klaasen pulls it along the ground for his fourth boundary off the over
short delivery outside off; cut to sweeper cover
yorker outside off; Heinrich Klaasen digs it back to Hardik Pandya
another brilliant yorker from Hardik. Klaasen fails to get bat down in time. Sneaks under the bat through to the keeper
slower short delivery on off; Klaasen looks to cut and misses. The ball sails over the bat
full and outside the tramline. Wided
another wide from Hardik. This was even futher outside off; wide called
another wide. Another full delivery outside the tramline
short delivery outside off; Klaasen cuts it to cover
short delivery outside off. Heinrich Klaasen gets a thick outside edge that flies down to third man. Spoils the over with that boundary. Hardik has a big smile on his face
off-cutter on middle; Nitish turns it to vacant mid-wicket

what a shot that is! Phew. This is not something you see often against someone like Jasprit Bumrah. The off-cutter sits right in the slot for Klaasen; he clears his front foot and goes inside out over cover. Goes through with the shot and the timing is superb to take the ball way into the deep cover fence
fuller on middle; driven down to long-on
slower delivery on off; pushed to the off-side
another slower delivery from Bumrah. Sits up nicely on a shortish length. Nitish pulls it to deep square leg. Finds the gap on the on-side for four
fuller outside off; driven along the ground down to long-off
full and at the stumops; Nitish looks to drive and skews a thick inside edge through mid-wicket
fuller length delivery and well wide of off; sliced away square on the off-side for a single
full and at the stumps; driven back at the bowler - Boult's left feet comes in the way and the ball deflects towards mid-wicket
very full and just outside off - Klaasen can't get under it on the drive; long-on gets across to his left and keeps them down to a single
a polite appeal for caught behind; but only Boult was interested; went full and pushed one across the right-hander as Nitish shaped up for the reverse sweep
just 4 off the over; fuller length delivery and shaping away from wide of off; Nitish throws his hands on the drive and missed
beautifully played; a 22-ball fifty for Heinrich Klaasen - flighted delivery on off; the right-hander backed away; let the ball come and then went inside out with a free-flowing lofted drive
flighted delivery on middle; worked into the gap wide of mid-wicket for a single
tossed up on middle and leg; pushed down to long-on for a single; brings up SRH's 200

the reverse sweep and Klaasen has sent it towering into the 2nd tier; tossed up just outside off - Klaasen switches stance; gets under it and then swipes it over backward point. A sensational shot as SRH get closer
tossed up on off; punched down to long-off for a single
nicely played; flighted delivery on off - Nitish backs away; opens up the off-side and finds the gap wide of cover; no need to run for those
fuller length delivery outside off - Klaasen drags the drive back past the bowler for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Suryakumar Yadav!! A top-edge
event_info: goes a mile high and Suryakumar Yadav takes a good catch at deep backward square leg. Banged in short and the right-hander was slightly rushed onto the pull; hit a fraction high and went up into the Mumbai night sky - not a lot of distance and the Indian T20I captain watches it closely as he grabbed a good catch. Nitish Reddy c Suryakumar Yadav b Trent Boult 21(17) [4s-3]
nicely played; yorker length delivery outside off - Arora waits on it; opens the face of the bat and then steers it past the diving backward point fielder; off the mark with a boundary
banged in short and pushed across the right-hander - Arora wasn't in control over the pull; spooned it in the air and over square leg
fuller length delivery outside off; Klaasen goes hard on the drive and mistimed it to the left of Hardik at mid-off
full-toss from Boult and it's drilled down to long-on for a single
fuller length delivery at the stumps; driven down to long-on for a single
Bumrah is completely off the rails tonight; a juicy full-toss and it's hammered over the bowler's head; bounces away to the ropes
good comeback from Bumrah - slower short ball into the pitch and Klaasen is early into the pull; gets an under-edge onto his shoulder
slower short ball outside off; Klaasen drags the pull through mid-wicket for a single
hammered; the slower ball from Bumrah; but it's right in the slot and Arora throws the kitchen sink on the lofted drive; high and over long-off for a maximum
low full-toss outside off - punched down to long-off. Bumrah is done for today; 0 for 54 are his returns
top-edge and four; the bottom-hand came off on impact; but Arora has enough on the shot to clear short fine; a bounce and over the ropes
drilled; a full-toss and Arora doesn't miss out; brings the bottom-hand into play and shovels it over wide long-on for a maximum
slower short ball outside off - Arora swipes across the line and misses
5th win on the bounce for SRH; back of a length and at the stumps - Arora picks the length early; swivels across and nails the pull; high and over mid-wicket for a maximum
